data.title: Temple Digital Group Completes $5 Million Seed Round Led by Paper Ventures
data.description: Temple Digital Group, a digital asset trading platform, announced the completion of a $5 million seed round of funding led by Paper Ventures, with participation from YZi, CMT Digital, Sfermion, Halo Capital, Protagonist, 5 N Canton, Eterna Capital, and GSR. The new funds will support the construction of a privacy-focused digital asset trading platform on the Canton Network, while also supporting the integration of additional assets, financial instruments, and cross-blockchain networks. (PRNewswire)

data.title: KGEN's price surged past 0.63 USDT after listing on MGBX, with a 24-hour increase exceeding 200%.
data.description: MGBX spot market data shows that KGEN has risen above 0.63 USDT and is currently trading at 0.48 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of over 200% and a circulating market value of over US$130 million.

data.title: Fed Governor Milan: The 25 basis point rate cut has resulted in interest rate adjustments being slower than actual needs
data.description: Federal Reserve Board Governor Milan said that the 25 basis point rate cut resulted in a slower rate adjustment than was actually needed, and that the risk premium was not particularly high. Due to the rapid rise in the neutral interest rate, policy has been tightened by about 1.5 percentage points this year. (Jinshi)

data.title: a16z invests $50 million in Jito, the Solana ecosystem staking protocol
data.description: a16 announced that it has invested $50 million in Jito, a Solana ecosystem staking protocol, through its cryptocurrency division. In return for its investment, the company received a portion of Jito's cryptocurrency quota. This is reportedly the largest investment in Jito by a single investor to date.

data.title: Fed Governor Waller: Inflation is not an obstacle to rate cuts
data.description: Fed Governor Waller said inflation is not an obstacle to rate cuts, and the neutral interest rate is about 100 to 125 basis points lower than the current federal funds rate. The outlook for interest rates after October depends on the labor market. (Jinshi)

data.title: Fed Governor Waller: If GDP remains resilient, the pace of rate cuts is expected to slow
data.description: Fed Governor Waller said the pace of interest rate cuts is expected to slow if GDP remains resilient or the job market accelerates.

data.title: MoonPay Launches MoonPay Commerce, a Unified Crypto Payment Platform
data.description: MoonPay has announced the launch of MoonPay Commerce, a unified crypto payment platform built on Helio technology that provides merchants, creators, and developers with a faster and simpler way to accept global crypto payments. Over 6,000 businesses are already using the platform, including Shopify, the Solana Foundation, Ledger, and CoinMarketCap. MoonPay Commerce will also support Shopify's Solana Pay, enabling instant, low-cost cryptocurrency payments at checkout. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Figment acquires blockchain analytics firm Rated Labs
data.description: Staking service provider Figment announced the acquisition of blockchain analytics firm Rated Labs for an undisclosed amount. UK-based Rated, founded in 2022, provides tools such as the Rated Explorer and data APIs to track staking performance across networks like Ethereum, Solana, and Cosmos. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Fed Governor Barr: Genius Act fails to provide adequate consumer protections
data.description: Federal Reserve Board Governor Barr said the Genius Act failed to provide adequate consumer protection and called for stronger regulatory guardrails for stablecoins. (Jinshi)

data.title: Chainlink and MegaETH Launch Real-Time On-Chain Data Stream Oracle
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Chainlink and MegaETH have announced the deployment of the first real-time, on-chain data stream oracle on MegaETH. This unprecedented protocol-level implementation delivers Chainlink's trusted market data to the blockchain with sub-millisecond latency.

The integration seamlessly incorporates Chainlink data streams into MegaETH's execution environment through native precompilation, enabling any smart contract to access real-time, high-frequency market data. This development lays a new foundation for real-time decentralized finance (DeFi), allowing applications like perpetual contracts, prediction markets, and stablecoins to achieve centralized exchange (CEX)-level responsiveness and precision while maintaining full on-chain composability.

Lei, co-founder and CTO of MegaETH, stated that integrating Chainlink data streams at the protocol layer provides developers with low-latency, efficient on-chain market data, which is essential for building the next generation of real-time decentralized financial applications.

This integration introduces a new oracle model that combines the simplicity of traditional on-chain oracles with the immediacy of data streams. Chainlink data streams refresh instantly when accessed by contracts, eliminating latency mismatches and redundant updates. Any smart contract can directly read real-time market data from precompilation without the need for custom off-chain logic.

Chainlink's extensive network supports various asset classes, including cryptocurrencies, equities, commodities, and real-world assets (RWAs), enabling the scalability of high-performance DeFi. The initial deployment focuses on high-frequency crypto assets, establishing a new low-latency standard for on-chain price discovery.

When oracle latency is reduced to single-digit milliseconds and data quality meets institutional benchmarks, DeFi achieves parity with centralized trading infrastructure, enabling real-time settlement, precise funding rates, and continuously updated derivatives, all secured by Ethereum.

Chainlink is the largest and most trusted data provider in the crypto space. Its oracles have supported over $25 trillion in transaction volume, securing more than $100 billion in total value locked, and have verified over 18 billion cross-chain messages. Chainlink data streams are a low-latency oracle solution designed for applications requiring high-frequency market data, supported by Chainlink's decentralized oracle network (DON). Independent nodes aggregate, verify, and sign each data report before transmission, ensuring data integrity while maintaining real-time updates.

MegaETH, the first real-time blockchain, is secured by Ethereum and supported by a highly optimized execution environment and heterogeneous architecture. It achieves 10-millisecond block times and up to 100,000 TPS streaming throughput. Developers can extend applications through real-time state streams, and users can enjoy instant transactions while fully retaining Ethereum's composability.

data.title: FSB: Crypto regulatory arbitrage could trigger a “chain of failures”
data.description: The Financial Stability Board (FSB) stated that its review of nearly 40 jurisdictions found "significant gaps and inconsistencies" in crypto regulation, fostering regulatory arbitrage and cross-border "forum shopping." The FSB noted that cross-border collaboration is "fragmented and inadequate," and that weak regulation of leverage and stablecoins could trigger cascading risks under market pressure. The European Banking Authority (EBA) also stated that some crypto companies choose to enter the market in EU member states with less stringent regulations. The FSB issued eight recommendations, calling for improvements in data, asset segregation, and cross-border law enforcement to reduce systemic risks. (Decryp)

data.title: Blockchain financial services company Telcoin completes $25 million in funding
data.description: Telcoin, a blockchain-based financial services company, announced that it has secured $25 million in funding to support the launch of its Telcoin digital asset bank. The funds will help meet regulatory requirements for the bank's operations, which are expected to begin later this year after receiving final approval from Nebraska regulators. (Businesswire)

data.title: The market capitalization of the tokenized gold sector rose to a new high of US$3.28 billion, with a 24-hour increase of 2.1%.
data.description: As the spot gold price broke through $4,250/ounce, the market capitalization of the tokenized gold sector also rose. Coingecko data shows that it has now risen to $3,281,705,612, setting a new high, with a 24-hour increase of 2.1%. Among them, the market capitalization of XAUT is close to $1.6 billion, and the market capitalization of PAXG has exceeded $1.3 billion.

data.title: ZOOZ spent $10 million to increase its holdings by approximately 88 BTC, bringing its total Bitcoin holdings to 942.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed company ZOOZ announced that it has spent $10 million to increase its holdings of approximately 88.888 BTC, with an average purchase price of $112,500 per Bitcoin. Since adopting the Bitcoin treasury strategy in July 2025, the company's total Bitcoin holdings have increased to 942. (PRNewswire)

data.title: RECALL launches Bitget CandyBomb
data.description: Bitget CandyBomb has launched the RECALL project, offering a total prize pool of 50,000 RECALL tokens. Completing specific contract trading volume tasks will earn a maximum of 333 RECALL tokens per participant. The promotion ends at 16:00 (UTC+8) on October 23rd.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 1,190 USDT with a 0.82% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Oct 16, 2025, 13:35 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 1,190 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 1,190.22998 USDT, with a narrowed 0.82% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Spot gold continues to hit a record high of $4,250 per ounce
data.description: Spot gold continued to hit a record high of $4,250 per ounce, up more than 1% on the day. (Jinshi)

data.title: Coinbase Launches Bitcoin Yield Fund in the US Market
data.description: According to official news, Coinbase Asset Management announced the launch of the Bitcoin income fund Coinbase US Bitcoin Yield strategy (USCBYF) in the US market, which is mainly aimed at qualified investors in the United States and aims to seek excess returns that exceed Bitcoin.

data.title: Decentralized energy network Daylight completes $75 million in funding, with participation from a16z Crypto and others
data.description: Daylight, a decentralized energy network, announced it has secured $15 million in equity funding led by Framework Ventures and with participation from a16z Crypto, Lerer Hippeau, M13, Room 40 Ventures, EV3, Crucible Capital, Coinbase Ventures, and Not Boring Capital. The company also secured $60 million in project development funding led by Turtle Hill Capital. The company plans to use the funds to build a cryptocurrency-powered distributed energy network and explore the launch of DayFi, an energy infrastructure-based yield protocol. (Businesswire)

data.title: Robinhood US Launches ASTER
data.description: According to market news: Robinhood US has launched ASTER.
